relatedProfiles.full_name: Sylvia | Career advice for corporate go-getters

latestPosts.caption: She’s here 📖🥹 type “BOOK” to pre-order today (!!!)

I AM IN SHOCK!!! Thank you @nytimes !!!!! 

The Secret Language of Work is officially a NYT BESTSELLER 🥹

@Forbes 30 Under 30 class of 2025 🥹

4 years ago (almost to the day), I sat in my cozy 400sqft Brooklyn apartment, bored out of my mind as the pandemic stalled all my exciting work in the film industry + I was living on my emergency fund. 

As I scrolled TikTok, I thought about what I could do to make the world a tiny bit better. How could I help people feel happier and more confident? I thought it would be cool to post some career and life advice, things I would tell my younger self—but make it realistic, super helpful, and relatable lol. 

So, I propped my phone up on my AC unit and recorded “how to answer the worst interview question ever: tell me about yourself”. I edited it, posted it, and went to bed. I woke up with over 20M views on that video and thousands of DMs flooding my account. 

I saw the impact just one little video made on so many lives. I became addicted to the challenge of making education (esp such “boring” topics like how to make a resume or save for retirement) fun + exciting + accessible. 

Since then, we’ve grown to a community of 6.5 MILLION people from all over the world. Hundreds of thousands have used my templates to advocate for themselves, negotiate higher pay for them + the ones they care for, and land their dream jobs.

So THANK YOU @forbes & congrats to the class of 2025. 

And thank you, whoever you are, wherever you are reading this, for supporting me + my mission by being here. 

+ lastly, thank you to my husband @michaelponton who supports me every single day & is the best life collaborator a girl could wish for. 

#ForbesUnder30

Respectfully, if you aren’t stalking the company you’re interviewing with on LinkedIn like you stalk your ex’s new girlfriend on IG what are you even doing?? 😌

You got this 👏 #jobinterview #careeradvice

PS - need help preparing & getting pumped up?? Type “INTERVIEW101” to check out my free interview prep guide 📝✨
Be your own role model 🤍✨ you got this!
Any guesses?! 😏 I’d honestly be shocked if someone got it! You’ll find out sooooooon :)

This video is over 3 minutes so apparently IG won’t show it to anyone lol but there’s no quicker way to truncate a nuanced 32-page study & the misinformation was driving me nuts 😅 — I read the study, here’s what you need to know! And I def encourage you to read the study for yourself 🫶🏼

You got this 👏 #stanford #hiring #ai

#stitch with the lovely @askcatgpt ✨ 3 tips on how to be more direct ~without~ being rude! 

PSA in case no one told you: you do NOT have to change your personality in order to become a direct person. 

Directness comes in all shapes and sizes. But remember: being clear is literally the nicest thing you can do for other people 🙌

You got this 👏 #careeradvice #communication 

💬 Don’t have my book yet!? Tragedy!! Type “BOOK” & I’ll send you the link (I read the audiobook too 🎙️)

Me: click clackin’ shooting off emails about deadlines 👩🏼‍💻
My body: preparing for battle 🤺🤺🤺 #work #thirdtrimester #funny #job #pregnant

I’ll go first (even though I’m still cookin 🍳 lol): 

Self-employed so my boss (me) just saved up $$ (8 solid weeks of DND, prob 8 more weeks of WFH/no travel but who knows my boss is playing it by ear). 

What was your situation?? Also feel free to name drop your employer so others can know 👀 

You got this 👏 #parentalleave #maternityleave #corporate

🧠 Reminder to network with a MIX of folks! 

Reach out to your peers, executives, thought leaders, warm connections, alumni, in addition to recruiters. 

Remember: a good recruiter will never get annoyed at a quality candidate introducing themselves (finding you is literally their job). But you can actually go around the recruiter altogether if you know the real decision maker 😎 

Want to reach out but not sure of what to say? 😩 
💬 type “SECRETS” to get my best templates + scripts, all in one place!

You got this 👏 #networking #linkedin #jobsearch
